testType: WP3 Live Integration — Foundry IQ Threshold Calibration
backend: Azure AI Search Knowledge Base (Free Tier)

tests.name: Test (a): In-corpus security log query
tests.query: What time did Helena Voss exit the gallery on October 14?

tests.name: Test (b): Planted-lie contradiction detection
tests.query: Is the claim 'Helena Voss left the gallery at approximately 7:45pm' true?
tests.expectedOutcome: Returns contradiction: Helena actually left at 20:47 (security log)

foundryResult.contradiction: Claimed departure: 19:45 (7:45 PM). Logged departure: 20:47:33 (8:47 PM). Temporal conflict: 62 minutes.

tests.name: Test (c): Out-of-corpus fail-closed response
tests.query: What is the recommended daily intake of vitamin C for adults?

foundryResult.verdict: Evidence file is silent on this point.

tests.name: Test (d): Document fetch by docKey
tests.documentSample: Electronic Access Log — Holbrooke Gallery [System: Salto ProAccess SPACE v3.7] [2025-10-14 records with badge entry/exit timestamps] ... Helena Voss (HV-0041) exit at 20:47:33 ...

thresholdCalibration.rationale: Conservative threshold set at 88% of spike in-corpus baseline (3.9889 * 0.88 ≈ 3.51). Scores above threshold are returned with citations. Scores below or zero indicate out-of-corpus (no relevant evidence).
thresholdCalibration.rule: If max(rerankerScore) < 3.5, return references=[] and message: 'The evidence file is silent on this point.'
thresholdCalibration.costNote: All queries stayed within free-tier limits. Total tokens consumed: ~280 (reasoning tokens from agentic retrieval at 'minimal' effort). No billing incurred.

failClosedBehavior.description: Out-of-corpus queries return empty references array with graceful message
failClosedBehavior.example: Query for vitamin C intake returned references=[], reasoningTokens=0
failClosedBehavior.gameImpact: Prevents hallucinated citations. Players cannot catch lies about topics not in the evidence corpus.
